definitions.text: A substance that is applied as a liquid or paste, and dries into a solid coating that protects or adds colour to an object or surface to which it has been applied.
A set of containers or blocks of paint of different colors/colours, used for painting pictures.
The free-throw lane, construed with the.
examples: The Nimrods are strong on the outside, but not very good in the paint.
I painted the bathroom walls light blue, and I painted the ceiling white.

definitions.text: To apply in the manner that paint is applied.
